cloud.title: Host a SiLA cloud endpoint
cloud.description: Home Assistant will listen for SiLA 2 v1.1 server-initiated connections on this port. Instruments configured with this gateway as their cloud endpoint appear automatically as devices.

data_description.tls_mode: Most lab instruments use self-signed certificates; 'Pin server certificate' fetches and trusts the certificate the server presents right now.

zeroconf_confirm.title: SiLA server found
zeroconf_confirm.description: Add the SiLA server {name} at {host}:{port} to Home Assistant?

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the SiLA server. Check host, port, and connection security mode.

abort.already_configured: This SiLA server is already configured.

options.pin: Pin server certificate (recommended for lab instruments)

call_command.name: Call SiLA command
call_command.description: Calls a command on a SiLA server, optionally with parameters.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The SiLA server to call the command on.

parameters.name: Parameters
parameters.description: Command parameters as a mapping of parameter identifier to value.

wait.name: Wait for completion
wait.description: For observable (long-running) commands: wait until the command finishes and return its responses. If off, the service returns immediately with the execution UUID; completion fires the sila_command_finished event.
